message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class "«aggregate» Product" {
    +E Product
}

Product --|> ShortDescription : characterized by
ShortDescription .. E::C_ShortDescription :: C <<value object>> 
note right of ShortDescription: «value object»*n*ShortDescription 

Product --|> LongDescription : characterized by
LongDescription .. V_O_LongDescription :: O <<value object>> 
note left of LongDescription: *v**alue **o**bject*n*LongDescription 

Product --|> TechnicalDescription : characterized by
TechnicalDescription .. V_O_TechnicalDescription :: T <<value object>> 
note above of TechnicalDescription: *«value object»**T*echnicalDescription 

Product --|> Barcode : identified by
Barcode .. V_O_Barcode :: B <<value object>> 
note below of Barcode: **«value object>**B<arcode 

Product --|> ProductionCode : identified by
ProductionCode .. P_C_ProductionCode :: R <<entity>> 
note under ProductionCode: <u>R</u>eference 

Product --|> PriceWithoutVAT : associated to
PriceWithoutVAT .. M_W_PriceWithoutVAT :: W <<measure>> 
note on link of PriceWithoutVAT: **€M€asure €Without VAT 

Product --|> PriceWithNvat : associated to
PriceWithNvat .. N_Vat_Npricewithnvat :: A <<amount>> 
note over of PriceWithNvat: Amount With NVAT 

Product --|> Reference : described by
Reference .. D_R_Reference :: I <<identifier>> 
note beside of Reference: Identifier for reference 

Product --|> Weight : measured in kg/m3/g/lb/oz/t etc...
Weight .. K_G_Weight :: Q <<quantity>> 
note near of Weight: Quantity expressed through weight units like kilograms or grams depending upon context requirements
